title: Etching method and etching apparatus
abstract: An etching method for selectively etching a material containing Si and O is provided. The etching method includes providing a substrate containing the material containing Si and O in a chamber, repeating a first period for supplying a basic gas, which is started first, and a second period for supplying a fluorine-containing gas, which is started next, with at least a part of the second period not overlapping with the first period, and heating and removing a reaction product generated by the supply of the basic gas and the supply of the fluorine-containing gas.
claims: 1. An etching apparatus for selectively etching an etching target material of SiO 2 with respect to a non-etching material of SiN, comprising: a chamber accommodating a substrate containing the etching target material of SiO 2 and the non-etching material of SiN; a substrate support on which the substrate is placed in the chamber; a gas supply mechanism configured to supply a basic gas and a fluorine-containing gas into the chamber; an exhaust mechanism configured to exhaust the chamber; a temperature controller configured to control a temperature of the substrate on the substrate support; and a control unit, wherein the control unit controls the gas supply mechanism, the exhaust mechanism, and the temperature controller to repeat a first period for supplying the basic gas, which is started first, and a second period for supplying the fluorine-containing gas, which is started next, with at least a part of the second period not overlapping with the first period, and to heat and remove a reaction product generated by the supply of the basic gas and the supply of the fluorine-containing gas.
